Break & Retest is honestly one of the cleanest price-action strategies. Waiting for the retest instead of chasing the breakout can save traders from so many fake moves. Great explanation! 📈🔥
Break & Retest is honestly one of the cleanest price-action setups. Waiting for confirmation instead of chasing the breakout can save traders from so many fake moves. Great explanation! 📈🔥

Might be helpful for some: you can detect false breakout by using fib levels 0, 1, -0.27. Put 1 at the beginning of a breakout and 0 at the end. Wait for price to break -0,27. I backtested it and it reverses from -0.13 and -0.27 if it’s false br😊.

In my trading circles, we call wick rejections “John Wicks” because “something big is about to go down”

"I am also doing paper trading on options buying in Nifty 50 (scalping on the 1-minute chart) using this retest strategy, achieving a 3:4 winning rate:

1. Market Structure Breakout Indicator (filtering only the MSB line)


2. Market Structure Zig-Zag TFLab (filtering only the major ChoCH line)



Using these indicators, I identify successful breakouts and wait for a retest to enter the trade.

Please review these indicators and provide your suggestions.

Let me know if any refinements are needed!"

Would you like any further improvements?
Bro you're forex angel.. thank you so much for this information

In the reversal section, makes more sense to enter at the double top above the last top, smaller stop loss and more potential gain, if wrong you dont lose anymore money than you would have entering at the neckline with a stop loss above

Think here, what's higher probability on that double top, that is fails and price goes down or that waiting to look for entry at the neckline when the down move has already moved 30 points from the double top.
